name: documents_v2
notes: Queried by GET /api/documents/:id/preview to retrieve file_path and file_type for the requested document. The query is SELECT * but only file_path and file_type are consumed by the preview handler.

file_path is resolved to a physical disk path via path.join(config.uploadDir, path.basename(doc.file_path)) and streamed with res.sendFile(); file_type is forwarded as the HTTP Content-Type response header.
